workplan: Build Agent 2: Provider Discovery. Query Firestore for providers, pre-filter by service_type, then use LLM to intelligently match by location and criteria.
tasks_completed: Created discovery_agent with provider matching instruction
Implemented service_type pre-filter before sending to LLM (efficiency)
discover_providers() returns matched_providers with match_score and match_reason
decisions_made: Pre-filter by service_type in Python before LLM call to reduce token usage
Fallback to all providers if no service_type match (broad search)
LLM assigns match_score 0.0-1.0 and explains match_reason per provider
outcome: Discovery agent found 1 matching AC_REPAIR provider in DHA Lahore (Bilal Ahmad) from Firestore during pipeline test.
